prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan RB26DETT (2.6L twin-turbo inline-6) with forged internals (CP pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, Tomei 272° camshafts) and a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (84mm compressor, .82 A/R turbine housing) running 2.0 bar of boost on E85 fuel, paired with a Nismo 555cc/min fuel pump and Injector Dynamics ID1700X injectors

Full custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with a 76mm titanium tip, featuring a Tomei 4-2-1 header and a custom 3-inch downpipe with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise turbo management

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (Y50-2559-01) with 8kg/mm front springs and 10kg/mm rear springs, adjustable camber plates (Cusco Type RS), and a Nismo 4-point strut tower brace (20001-23U00) for chassis rigidity, paired with Endless CC-RG6 brake pads and DBA 5000 Series rotors (355mm front, 330mm rear)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Pandem Gloria-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper canards, and a ducktail spoiler, finished in Nissan Racing Yellow (code: 3Y3)

Voltex Type-5 rear diffuser with integrated carbon fiber side skirts and a custom front splitter by Seibon Carbon, featuring a 3D-printed air dam with integrated LED fog lights (Philips X-tremeUltinon 11000K)

Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 +15 front and 18x11 +25 rear wheels (gunmetal finish) with Toyo R888R tires (275/35/18 front, 305/30/18 rear), paired with a custom rear quarter window delete (carbon fiber) and a Nismo GT-R-style rear wing (3D-printed ABS, adjustable angle)
